final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign named "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, luxurious aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the "染秋" fragrance new product launch theme
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumn-toned atmospheric backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, premium atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a high-quality, tactile surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" (large, primary, centered)
Constraints: must preserve 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title must be visually prominent and legible
Avoid:
